vertical-slices.notes: Issue #5 explicitly flags missing vertical slice. Correctly identifies that schema, error types, data access, domain logic, and API layer should be a cohesive slice.

factory-di.notes: Issue #1 flags hard-imported I/O and prescribes createOrderRoutes({ db, emailer }). Correctly identifies it as 'most impactful architectural rule'.

crosscutting-via-wrapping.notes: Issue #4 explicitly names withTracing(service) / withLogging(service) wrapper pattern. States 'not inline logger.info() calls inside handlers'.

structured-api-errors.notes: Issue #3 flags bare { message } errors and prescribes { type, code, status, detail } format.

api-first.notes: Issue #2 quotes the rule verbatim: 'define schema (OpenAPI, route schema) BEFORE handler'. Identifies missing API contract as Critical severity.

bonus_observations: Review is thorough with 15 issues total, covering rules beyond the 5 graded criteria.
Severity ratings are reasonable. Summary table is well-structured.
Issue #9 (race condition) shows deep understanding beyond surface-level style review.
